name: inv7-claims-bounded-by-comparability
notes: When no comparable baseline exists the comparator abstains from ALL transitions rather than falling back to a weaker match. A run is recorded only at commit c2; comparing against ref c1 (HEAD~1, no run recorded there) yields comparability none with reason baseline-missing/determined, baseline null, and transitions omitted. The current run's red set is still fully disclosed via current.red (INV-1 floor under none, contract §5.7).
